title: mentha × villosa var. rosanii
intro: Mentha × villosa var. rosanii, also known as Lemon Mint or Rosy Mint, is a hybrid mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a carminative and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to ease digestive issues and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. rosanii include its potential to relieve symptoms of IBS, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically for its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
